prompt: Create a high-energy futuristic cyberpunk advertising poster for Adobe Creative Cloud, in a wide 16:9 format, set against a dense neon-lit nighttime megacity with glowing skyscrapers, holographic billboards, wet reflective streets, and a dark purple-blue-black atmosphere. Use an intense synthwave palette of electric magenta, cyan, violet, hot pink, and blue, with glowing edges, digital glitches, scanlines, light streaks, particle sparks, and HUD-style interface accents. At the upper left, place the Adobe logo and the word Adobe in red, followed by a huge bold techno headline reading Creative Cloud in luminous white and cyan with magenta glow, and beneath it a smaller tagline in all caps: 7 APPS. ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES.. Below that, add a short marketing paragraph in compact futuristic type: “POWER YOUR CREATIVITY WITH INDUSTRY-LEADING TOOLS FOR EVERY IDEA AND EVERY CREATOR.” On the upper right, feature a giant glowing rounded-square app icon containing the Adobe Creative Cloud symbol, rendered like a radiant neon hologram with cosmic texture and orange-pink-blue energy inside. Next to it, add a vertical Japanese neon sign reading “創造する、無限の力”. Across the lower middle, display exactly 7 illuminated app cards in a single horizontal row, each as a distinct glowing panel with beveled sci-fi borders, internal circuitry details, and matching neon color accents. Card 1: “Ps”, label “PHOTOSHOP”, subtitle “PHOTO EDITING”, with a simple landscape/image icon, in cyan-blue. Card 2: “Ai”, label “ILLUSTRATOR”, subtitle “VECTOR GRAPHICS”, with a pen-nib/vector icon, in orange-gold. Card 3: “Pr”, label “PREMIERE PRO”, subtitle “VIDEO EDITING”, with a film frame and play button icon, in purple-magenta. Card 4: “Ae”, label “AFTER EFFECTS”, subtitle “MOTION GRAPHICS”, with stacked layered-shapes icon, in violet. Card 5: “Id”, label “INDESIGN”, subtitle “LAYOUT & PUBLISHING”, with a text-layout icon, in pink-red. Card 6: “Lr”, label “LIGHTROOM”, subtitle “PHOTO MANAGEMENT”, with a landscape/photo icon, in cyan-teal. Card 7: “Xd”, label “XD”, subtitle “UI/UX DESIGN”, with a wireframe/app-window icon, in hot pink. Along the very bottom, add a glowing horizontal footer bar with exactly 5 feature blocks separated by thin neon dividers: 1) cloud icon with “SEAMLESS INTEGRATION”, 2) people icon with “BUILT FOR COLLABORATION”, 3) sync/cloud-arrow icon with “SYNC ACROSS DEVICES”, 4) graduation cap icon with “LEARN & GROW WITH CREATIVE CLOUD”, 5) a bold closing slogan at the far right reading MAKE IT. CREATIVE CLOUD.. Overall style: premium cinematic tech ad, ultra-detailed, razor-sharp, symmetrical promotional layout, glossy reflections, dramatic contrast, retro-futurist game UI aesthetics, polished commercial poster design.
